title: Fake Image Detection Dataset
description:
3-class fake image detection dataset for FakeGuard AI.

Classes:
  REAL (0)          — authentic camera photographs
  AI_GENERATED (1)  — GAN / diffusion-model generated images
  EDITED (2)        — copy-move, splicing, retouching manipulations

Structure:
  train/real/
  train/ai_generated/
  train/edited/
  val/real/
  val/ai_generated/
  val/edited/

Sources: Flickr-Faces (real), StyleGAN (AI_GENERATED), CASIA v2 (edited)
Project: https://github.com/RuudyLinux/Fake-Image-Detections
